macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: Dow Jones Enters Correction Territory Amid Iran War Tensions
items.summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average closed down 793 points (1.73%) on March 27, 2026, officially entering correction territory with a drop exceeding 10% from its February peak. The decline reflects escalating geopolitical tensions and investor concerns over the Iran conflict.

items.title: S&P 500 Breaches 200-Day Moving Average, Marks Fifth Consecutive Week of Losses
items.summary: The S&P 500 closed at 6,477.16 on March 27, breaching below its 200-day moving average (~6,605) for the first time. The index has suffered five straight weeks of losses and is approaching correction territory, down from its January peak of nearly 6,980.

items.title: Nasdaq 100 Enters Correction as Tech Stocks Face Continued Pressure
items.summary: The Nasdaq 100 has entered correction territory alongside the Dow, with tech stocks facing headwinds from a rotation out of AI stocks into value shares and a sharp sell-off in memory stocks.

items.title: Oil Prices Surge to Highest Levels Since 2022 Amid Iran Conflict
items.summary: Brent crude settled near $113 per barrel, the highest level since 2022, as investors grapple with uncertainty over potential peace negotiations and Trump's decision to postpone bombing Iran's energy infrastructure.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin Drops to $66,000 Level Triggering $500 Million in Liquidations
items.summary: Bitcoin's price fell 3-4% in the past 24 hours to around $66,000-$66,500, sparking over $500 million in liquidations amid extreme fear in the market (Fear & Greed Index at 13) and broader market capitulation.

items.title: Ethereum Slides to $1,990 Amid DeFi Decline and Network Concerns
items.summary: Ethereum price dropped to approximately $1,990, down 7.5% over the past week, with DeFi TVL falling 3.1% to $48.2B and reduced Layer-2 activity pressuring fundamentals.

items.title: Market Awaits Regulatory Signals as Bitcoin Maintains Dominance
items.summary: Bitcoin holds dominance despite price pullback, with the market sensitive to upcoming U.S., U.K., EU, and Asia regulatory developments; stablecoins emerge as key infrastructure amid institutional focus.

items.title: LegacyCoin CTO Launches Crypto Ownership Solution for Asset Continuity
items.summary: LegacyCoin CTO announced a new platform on March 28 for self-custody of digital assets with predefined on-chain transfer conditions, addressing long-term asset management challenges.

items.title: Morgan Stanley Enters Bitcoin ETF Market with Low 0.14% Fee
items.summary: Morgan Stanley launched a Bitcoin ETF with a competitive 0.14% fee to attract institutional investors, even as Bitcoin faces volatility and miners shift to AI.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Google Research Reveals AI Intelligence Emerges from Simulated Multi-Agent Interactions
items.summary: Google researchers demonstrate that advanced reasoning models like DeepSeek-R1 and QwQ-32B exhibit 'societies of thought' through internal debates and multi-perspective interactions, challenging the idea of singular AI intelligence. This emergent behavior improves accuracy on hard reasoning tasks via reinforcement learning.

items.title: CERN Deploys Tiny AI Models Burned into Silicon for Real-Time LHC Data Filtering
items.summary: CERN is using extremely small, custom large language models physically integrated into silicon chips to filter massive data from the Large Hadron Collider in real-time, showcasing 'tiny AI' with minimal footprint for high-performance applications.

items.title: Google Updates Gemini Code Assist with Agent Mode and Enhanced Features
items.summary: Google rolled out new features for Gemini Code Assist including agent mode with auto-approve, inline diff views, and improved context management to create tailored coding collaborators for developers.
items.source: Midnight Signal AI / Google Developers Blog

items.title: No New AI Model Releases in Last 24 Hours
items.summary: Tracking sites report no new large language model releases or major benchmark updates from leading labs like OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, or Meta in the past day.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: GameStop Downgraded to 'Sell' by Wall Street Zen
items.summary: Wall Street Zen downgraded GameStop from 'hold' to 'sell', citing concerns about the video game retailer's long-term viability as it struggles with digital downloads and online competition. The company reported a 27% revenue drop and 35% decline in earnings per share in its most recent quarter.

items.title: Sony Raises PS5 Prices by $100 in US and £90 in UK
items.summary: Sony announced a significant price increase for PlayStation 5, PS5 Pro, and PlayStation Portal devices effective April 2, 2026, citing continued pressures in the global economic landscape.

items.title: Mega Cat Studios Releases 'God of War: Sons of Sparta'
items.summary: Pittsburgh-based Mega Cat Studios released God of War: Sons of Sparta, a retro 2D Metroidvania-style prequel on PS5 as part of the franchise's 20th anniversary celebration. The project involved a 400-person development team across multiple international locations.

items.title: Ayaneo Warns of Price Hikes and Production Changes for Handheld Consoles
items.summary: Ayaneo announced upcoming price increases for multiple handheld console models due to rising memory component costs, with some models facing temporary discontinuation. The Pocket S Mini promotion offering a free Pocket AIR Mini ends April 1, 2026.

items.title: CookieRun: NewWorld Announced as 3D Open-World RPG for 2029
items.summary: Devsisters announced CookieRun: NewWorld during DevNow 2026 Showcase, an ambitious 3D open-world RPG launching in 2029. The company also released CookieRun: OvenSmash and announced new content for existing CookieRun titles.

items.title: Industry Veterans John and Brenda Romero Warn of Gaming Crisis
items.summary: Legendary game developers John and Brenda Romero stated that the gaming industry is 'in a really horrible place,' comparing current conditions to the 1980s crash and citing massive project cancellations, studio closures, and widespread layoffs.

items.title: Brie Larson Calls for Hollywood to Learn from Gaming Industry
items.summary: Actress Brie Larson stated that the film and television industry should draw inspiration from video games, noting that gaming audiences now surpass film and television audiences in scale.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: US Bans Non-American Wi-Fi Routers Over Security Concerns
items.summary: The Trump administration has banned new non-US-made Wi-Fi routers, citing supply chain vulnerabilities and cybersecurity risks. The FCC stated that foreign routers could potentially be used to spy on US citizens.

items.title: DJI Avata 360 Drone Emerges as New Market Leader
items.summary: The DJI Avata 360 has been tested and deemed superior to previous frontrunner models, offering greater agility, versatility, 10-bit image quality, and a more affordable price point.

items.title: iOS 26.4 Introduces Age Verification for UK Users
items.summary: Apple's latest iOS update includes age verification checks for UK users, marking a notable shift in the company's approach to user verification and age-gating features.

items.title: Sonos Play Speaker Receives Positive Reviews
items.summary: The Sonos Play speaker has been tested and received favorable reviews from tech reviewers, establishing itself as a notable product in the audio market.
